title: Kids Like You & Me
overview: 'Kids Like You and Me' documents the Black Lips' tour through one of the most exciting regions in the world, including three groundbreaking stops in Egypt. Get on the bus with the Black Lips and their good friends, Lebanese indie rockers Lazzy Lung. See the people of the Middle East the way they really are. You'll never look at the Middle East the same way.
